svg.text: AWS EKS — Security Group & NACL Architecture
Defense in Depth • Least Privilege • VPC Flow Logs • Zero Trust Network
No SSH, no ICMP, no other ports
TO NAT GW: TCP 443 (ECR image pulls)
TO VPC Endpoints: TCP 443 (S3, STS, CW)
Istio Ambient Mesh — mTLS STRICT between ALL pods • L4 AuthorizationPolicy • ztunnel sidecar-less
NO internet • NO public access • KMS encrypted
NO internet • Auth token required • TLS 1.2
No internet traversal for AWS API calls
Traffic passes through: Internet → WAF → ALB SG → Public NACL → Worker SG → Private NACL → Service SG → DB NACL → Pod NetworkPolicy → Istio mTLS
BookStore Platform • AWS EKS Security Group & NACL Architecture • Defense in Depth
